hero.badge: Learning OS wey dey based on behavior
hero.subtitle: Plenty years of learning science, AI, and how people dey behave — we put am for one place so that deep learning go be the normal thing.
hero.trust: Free to start · Earn-Back when you finish · No need card

principles.eyebrow: We build am on learning science
principles.title: No be just another video library
principles.subtitle: Every feature na behavior trick — we design am to change how much you remember and how far you go reach.

recall.title: Active recall, automatic
recall.body: Quiz before and after every lesson dey turn ordinary watching to memory wey go last.

spaced.title: Spaced repetition
spaced.body: Sharp reminder dey bring the lesson back the moment wey you wan forget am.

earnback.title: Earn-Back program
earnback.body: Promise yourself one deadline. Finish wetin you start, collect back the money wey you pay.

cohorts.title: Learn inside cohort
cohorts.body: Group of your padi, group work, and progress wey everybody fit see dey make am sweet.

pacing.title: Adaptive pacing
pacing.body: The platform dey read how fast and how steady you dey go, then e meet you for where you dey.

growth.title: Growth, no be score
growth.body: We dey show you how far you don grow — no be cold mark out of ten.

visual.title: How memory dey stay over time
visual.aria: Memory retention: spaced recall vs di forgetting curve

academies.title: One platform, plenty academy
academies.subtitle: Sub-platform wey you fit change, and na the same behavior engine dey power dem. Teacher Academy don dey live now now.

teacher.name: Teacher Academy
teacher.blurb: Sabi how to teach well with courses and cohorts wey dey based on behavior.

tech.name: Tech Academy
tech.blurb: Hands-on engineering tracks with code sandbox inside your browser.

business.name: Business Academy
business.blurb: Real business and leadership skill for the real world.

corporate.name: Corporate Academy
corporate.blurb: Team training and upskilling for organisations of any size.

visual.aria: One platform core wey connect to four academies

goal.title: Pick one goal
goal.body: Choose course, path, or cohort and set the deadline wey you wan finish am.

learn.title: Learn the correct way
learn.body: Micro-lessons, recall quiz, projects, and your cohort padi dey keep you moving.

finish.title: Finish & collect back
finish.body: Finish on time, collect your certificate — and collect back wetin you promise.

one.quote: I finally finish course instead of to leave am for 20%. The Earn-Back deadline keep me honest.
one.name: Adaeze O.

two.quote: The recall quiz before every lesson dey uncomfortable for the best way. Now I really dey remember things.
two.name: Tunde A.

three.quote: Na my cohort group chat make me show up every week. Learning come be like team game.
three.name: Grace M.

lesson.label: Max lesson length — we build am for focus

cta.title: You ready to learn the way your brain really dey work?
cta.subtitle: Join free, pick your first course, and set commitment wey you go proud to keep.
